title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Ferragamo Brand Management Co., Ltd
body: "Application number 5202  Applicant Salvatore Ferragamo S.P.A. objected to the name used by Ferragamo Brand Management Co., Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 4 July 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Ferragamo Brand Management Co., Ltd is changed to 15867887, Ltd. "
